ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie or show */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie or show */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie or show was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie or show */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the movie or show */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "cast" TEXT /* List of main cast members */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the movie or show */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "language" TEXT /* Original language of the movie or show */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie or show trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie or show poster */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID for external reference */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie or show */,
  "total_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's biography */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cust_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the rating has been deleted */,
  "is_updated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the rating has been updated */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES users ("cust_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the review has been deleted */,
  "is_updated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the review has been updated */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was last updated */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the review contains spoilers */,
  "helpfulness_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating how helpful the review is, based on user votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES users ("cust_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., regular user, critic, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Specific permission granted to that role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, delete, update) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("cust_id")
)
